fertilizer: Apply calcium nitrate for cell wall strength
tomato_early_blight.water: Use drip irrigation; water at base of plants in morning; avoid wetting foliage.

organic: Remove and destroy infected plants immediately
preventive: Apply preventive fungicide before rainy season
fertilizer: Potassium-rich fertilizers to strengthen plant immunity
tomato_late_blight.water: Reduce irrigation during wet periods; ensure field drainage; avoid waterlogging.
tomato_late_blight.recovery_time: 3-4 weeks; severe cases may require replanting

fertilizer: Adequate potassium and phosphorus at tuber initiation
potato_early_blight.water: Consistent soil moisture; avoid drought stress followed by heavy irrigation.

organic: Early sowing to escape peak rust period
preventive: Monitor fields weekly during heading stage
fertilizer: Balanced NPK; avoid late nitrogen top-dressing
wheat_rust.water: Avoid water stress during grain filling; ensure adequate but not excessive irrigation.
wheat_rust.recovery_time: 1-2 weeks if treated at first sign

rice_blast.water: Maintain intermittent irrigation; avoid prolonged flooding during blast-favorable weather.

fertilizer: Avoid excessive nitrogen in high-risk fields
corn_gray_leaf_spot.water: Avoid water stress during tasseling and silking stages.

fertilizer: Balanced NPK; avoid excess nitrogen attracting pests
cotton_bollworm.water: Maintain adequate moisture; avoid water stress that weakens plant defense.
cotton_bollworm.recovery_time: 1-2 weeks per generation; multiple sprays may be needed

fertilizer: Balanced nutrition; calcium sprays reduce bacterial susceptibility
pepper_bacterial_spot.water: Drip irrigation only; never overhead water; irrigate in morning.

fertilizer: Moderate nitrogen; adequate potassium and phosphorus
grape_powdery_mildew.water: Avoid excessive irrigation raising humidity; morning irrigation preferred.

preventive: Apply fungicide at green tip stage
fertilizer: Avoid excess nitrogen promoting soft tissue
apple_scab.water: Avoid sprinkler irrigation during scab-favorable weather.

mango_anthracnose.water: Avoid overhead irrigation during flowering; maintain orchard floor cleanliness.
mango_anthracnose.recovery_time: 2-3 weeks for trees; fruits may not recover

banana_sigatoka.water: Ensure good drainage; avoid waterlogging in plantation rows.
